name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_uvw_po_open_commitment_with_ageing_transport
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_po_open_commitment_with_ageing_transport' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Delivery_Completed_Indicator` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Creation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Document_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Delivery_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Delivery_Due` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Delivery_Completed_Indicator` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Creation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Document_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Delivery_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Delivery_Due` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Delivery_Completed_Indicator|Creation_Date|Document_Date|Delivery_Date|Delivery_Due' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`uvw_po_open_commitment_with_ageing_transport`
